problem id: 8a382428
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  00100001 -> 01000010
  11010101 -> 10101011
  11001110 -> 10011101
  11111010 -> 11110101
  01110001 -> 11100010
  00111001 -> 01110010
  11010111 -> 10101111
  01010001 -> 10100010
  00111101 -> 01111010

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 01100110
